caption: A man and a woman are seated side-by-side in a tiered seating area. The woman wears a black jacket with a small white identification badge pinned to her chest and holds white papers in her lap. The man wears glasses, a white collared shirt, a dark tie, and a grey suit jacket. He is actively gesturing with his hands as he speaks. In the beginning, the man extends his right hand in an open gesture while the woman looks toward him. As the sequence progresses, the woman briefly raises her right hand to her forehead, and the man continues to move his hands, bringing his right hand closer to his chest and then raising it slightly. The background consists of dark seating and the legs of other people sitting in rows behind them. No legible text or logos are visible on the identification badges.
